expectations.text: Represents both positions with at least one source each
expectations.evidence: Both camps presented with evidence (CNCF/CloudNativePG maturity vs Didi incident, failover bug, PVC data-loss scenario).

expectations.text: Explains the context-dependence that resolves the contradiction
expectations.evidence: 'Context mismatch, not factual dispute' framing; the do-you-already-debug-K8s test.

expectations.text: Gives a concrete recommendation for the stated context
expectations.evidence: Managed service unless K8s already in production for the app tier.

notes: Excellent contradiction handling with concrete failure incidents. Arguably the strongest old_skill run; nearly half the with_skill run's token cost.
